svg.title: Edit or Submit Vessel Visit Notification - Process View

g.text: Edit or Submit Vessel Visit Notification - Process View
The representative opens an existing Vessel Visit Notification\nin "InProgress" status to modify or complete details.
fill fields (ETA, ETD, Dock, Cargo, Crew, Safety Officers)
Representative can:\n• Keep status "InProgress" (save draft)\n• Or change status to "PendingApproval" (submit)
throws BusinessRuleViolationException("Cannot edit submitted or approved notification")
showError("Only InProgress notifications can be edited")
• Update ETA, ETD, DockAssignment, Crew, Cargo manifests
• Recalculate validation if status changes to "PendingApproval"
Displays confirmation and redirects to\nView Notification (view.html?id=...)
